description: Unspecified vulnerability in the Sun eXtended System Control Facility (XSCF) Control Package (XCP) firmware before 1050 on SPARC Enterprise M4000, M5000, M8000, and M9000 servers allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (reboot) via (1) telnet, (2) ssh, or (3) http network traffic that triggers memory exhaustion.
